items.title: Building highly available Oracle databases with Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP
items.snippet: This post shows how to build a highly available Oracle database architecture using FSxN shared storage, Auto Scaling groups with dynamic AMI updates, and serverless orchestration to help reduce recovery times with current configurations.
